name: INDOPACOM — contested Pacific island
description: Synthetic small-island defensive scenario in a contested A2/AD environment. Operator runs a small ISR UAS from a forward FOB on a fictional Pacific island. PRC-style assets are pre-placed: a DWL-002 passive surveillance system on a neighboring landmass, a CHL-906 tactical DF vehicle ashore, and a generic airborne SIGINT pod orbiting offshore. Designed to demonstrate that EMCON Sentinel works equally well outside the Ukraine-Russia framing — same math, different threat library.

adversaries.note: DWL-002 passive surveillance ~10 km north — long-range airborne reach
CHL-906 tactical DF vehicle ~10 km east — direct LoS
Airborne SIGINT pod ~10 km NW — fast time-to-fix
